summary: Added a short-lived in-memory cache for passed Codex CLI model probes.
Default TTL is 300000 ms and applies to automatic execution-time probes.
Cache keys include command, working directory, and model.
Callers can override the TTL or disable the cache explicitly.
remainingRisk: The probe cache is process-local memory only and does not survive restarts.
Live repeated Codex CLI executions were not run in this change set; validation used injectable spawners.
next: Consider surfacing cache hit and miss telemetry in host observability.
Consider exposing a host-level cache clear hook for long-lived desktop sessions.
